title: Banished from the Hero's Party, I Decided to Live a Quiet Life in the Countryside
sourceNotes: Light-novel-based; ranges are by LN VOLUME (the source, AniList id 104475), not manga chapters — AniList lists no chapter count for the source and the community episode↔source guides all track volumes. The "chapters" fields therefore hold volume numbers. Cumulative episodes across S1 (13) + S2 (12) = 25. S1 adapts volumes 1-4 (condensing four volumes by trimming action to keep the slow-life tone). S2 adapts volumes 5, 8 and 9, deliberately SKIPPING volumes 6 and 7 (so after S2 the LN resumes at volume 10). Within-season per-volume episode boundaries are approximate. LN complete at 15 volumes (final vol. released July 2025); volumes 10-15 are unadapted.
